name: Green Chili Beef Burritos
recipeIngredient: 1/2 teaspoon garlic powder or 1 clove garlic
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the beef in a pan and drain any excess fat.
2. Drain and add the canned chilies, then add the garlic powder or minced garlic.
3. Warm 10-12 flour tortillas by placing them on a medium-hot griddle or frypan for about 15 seconds on each side, or heat them in a covered container or wrap them in foil and place them in a 350°F oven for 10 minutes.
4. Divide the filling evenly among the warm tortillas.
5. Fold up the tortillas and place them filled tortillas in a 9x13-inch baking dish. Cover with foil.
6. Bake in a 350-375°F oven for 15-20 minutes, or microwave until heated through.
7. Sprinkle grated Cheddar cheese over the burritos during the last few minutes of baking time or before serving.
8. Serve on a bed of chopped lettuce with tomatoes, salsa, and sour cream.
